case_title: HELEN TSAI et al VS. CARLOS LOZANO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY TSAI, HELEN YEE, SIDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT LOZANO, CARLOS DBA POLANCOS TOWING SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED JUN-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOZANO, CARLOS DBA POLANCOS TOWING SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED JUN-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRANADOS, JAVIER LOZANO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) ****PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS TAKEN TO ROOM 103 FOR FILING****
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSAI, HELEN YEE, SIDNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOZANO, CARLOS DBA POLANCOS TOWING SERVICE GRANADOS, JAVIER LOZANO $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 7/15/11 TO CARLOS LOZANO OR JAVIER LOZANO GRANADOS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOZANO, CARLOS DBA POLANCOS TOWING SERVICE GRANADOS, JAVIER LOZANO
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
